positive: Minimalist abstract nature scene, featuring stylized woodland creatures and botanical elements. A playful fox silhouette sitting among delicate line-art ferns and blooming wildflowers. The composition is centered, with negative space surrounding the subject for high contrast apparel printing. Style: Clean vector art mixed with sophisticated single-line drawing. Color palette: Muted forest green, warm terracotta, and cream off-white on a transparent background. Lighting: Flat, even, graphic design lighting. Print Details: High resolution, perfect for screen printing or direct-to-garment printing, isolated elements, bold lines, symmetrical balance.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, messy, low detail, jpeg compression, signatures, logos, copyright, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy
